title: Atheists 'stunned' as ancient diaries by non-believers prove Jesus Christ really existed
description: Fresh research has reignited claims that Jesus was a real historical figure, with historians pointing to non-Christian Roman and Jewish sources by Tacitus and Josephus — linking “Christus” to Pontius Pilate — as key evidence that surprises some non-believers.

title: Milky Way fossil fragment reveals how our galaxy formed
description: Webb and Hubble reveal Terzan 5 is a rare cosmic fossil that could explain how the Milky Way and other galaxies formed.
